heading: Tchula Lake, Mississippi
label: 46 Tchula Lake, Mississippi
text: Tchula Lake, in Holmes County, in the State of Mississippi, is declared to be a nonnavigable stream within the meaning of the Constitution and laws of the United States.The right of Congress to alter, amend, or repeal this section is expressly reserved.
notes: CodificationThe two sentences comprising this section are, respectively, sections 1 and 2 of act , entitled “An act declaring Tchula Lake, Holmes County, Mississippi, to be a nonnavigable stream”.July 1, 1922
